programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon Movie - Mewtwo Ka Badla
programme.desc: Ash, Pikachu, and their friends come together to thwart Mewtwo's evil plan to destroy the world, after being cloned by Dr Fuji.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Perman

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Munki and Trunk
programme.desc: Munki and Trunk live together in a jungle, as they embark on various adventures, exploring the world and making new friends.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and team are chilling outside when they see a bunch of people walking towards Khanna's house. Soon, they realise it is a party organised by Kitty for her friends.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Khanna and Miss Katkar bring kites for the gang as there is a kite festival. Soon, they decide to compete in flying kites.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Zordaar assumes control of the household in the owner's absence, facing defiance from Honey, Bunny and Popat. Subsequently, their adventure to a nearby circus results in one member's capture.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and others join Kitty when she decides to go on an adventurous surfing trip, however, they come across unexpected challenges.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar gives responsibility to Honey, Bunny and team to look after the ripe mangoes on tree. Later, they encounter a naughty monkey eating those mangoes.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and their friends get into trouble when they end up in a rat's burrow while trying to catch a mischievous mouse.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Bunny mistakenly gets an egg instead of a ball while playing football. Later, everyone is taken aback when the egg starts cracking.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, Himawari and Misae are watching a cooking show about preparing Sushi. However, Misae is left shocked on seeing Yu-chan participating in the programme.

programme.title: Shin Chan: The Adult Empire Strikes Back
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his friends race to save the adults of Kasukabe when they begin to display childish behaviour after attending a 20th-century convention.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan: Mr. smelly's ambition
programme.desc: Shin-chan and the Nohara family travel back in time to stop Kasukabe's villain and his notorious gang from carrying out their evil mission.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! The Battle of the Warring States
programme.desc: Shinnosuke suddenly travels back in time to the Sengoku period. However, soon, he gets embroiled in various problems which impacts his family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin chan - Dangerous Family Holiday
programme.desc: Mitsy surprises the Nohara family with a trip to Australia. Upon their arrival, Harry gets abducted, leaving the others to rescue him.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden
programme.desc: Naruto returns stronger to face deadly foes, save his friends, and fulfill his destiny in this action-packed anime journey filled with loyalty, growth, and ninja values.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: The host, Kapil Sharma, welcomes Sufi musicians, Wadali Brothers as special guests, along with Punjabi musician Lakhwinder Wadali.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: The Phogat family graces Kapil's comedy show. Later, Geeta and Babita, with father Mahavir, enjoy hilarious banter with the host and his zany crew.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali is upset and deeply hurt to see Taarak eating a heavy breakfast with the Gadas. Champaklal supports Taarak until Anjali tells him about what Taarak did with her home-made meals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Anjali goes out of town for a day, Jethalal plans an elaborate feast for Taarak. In order to avoid eating diet food cooked by Daya, Taarak fakes being ill. Anjali finds out and gets tensed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Since Taarak cannot go out, Jethalal asks Natu Kaka and Bagha to bring food to Gokuldham. The duo land in trouble when the huge carton they're using to hide the food is seen by Goli.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pandemonium breaks out when Sodhi informs everyone that Anjali has returned home. While all the men hide in the kitchen with the food, Taarak tries to distract Anjali from the food aroma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Realising that the men are lying, all the women are furious and decide to teach them a lesson. Daya insists on using a special trick to get rid of the rat in Taarak's kitchen.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When an upset Anjali tries to walk away, Taarak tries to woo her with a nice song and also promises to obey her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men discuss friendships on social media. Later, the ladies of Gokuldham are elated due to the cozy climate caused by the rain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Later, Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner. Later, her suspection causes worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. Later, she's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply. Later, she decides to leave her house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Later, Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A gruesome murder in a crowded picnic spot has the Team CID investigating a bizarre case. Meanwhile, the team is led to believe that a trained falcon may have killed the man.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A girl talking on the phone near a construction site gets stabbed by someone. Later, when the CID team arrives for investigation they find a dead rickshaw driver along with the girl's dead body.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal loses his temper when he finds out his rail tickets can only be used on the same day. Meanwhile, Anjali and Taarak talk about their happy and peaceful life in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal sings a romantic song for his wife Daya, as Babita enters their house. Babita invites Daya to her house for a meet.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A gemstone helps Ratnavali uncover Popatlal's marital status. Babita takes the initiative to introduce Ratnavali to others.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells his friends about the secret meeting their wives are having. Daya and her friends ask their husbands to wear gemstones, but they don't know that their loyalty is being put to the test.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita presents Iyer with a necklace which he declines to don. Meanwhile, Jethalal queries Daya about her insistence on him wearing a similar adornment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The wives at Gokuldham make their husbands wear the lockets which, according to Ratnavali, will disclose their innermost feelings.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets happy on seeing Babita early in the morning and reprimands her for going shopping alone. He offers to help her but Babita tells him to finish his errand before Ratnavali comes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A lady gives all the men of Gokuldham a locket and tells them its colour will change when they partake in any suspicious activity.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: Himesh Reshammiya and Iulia Vantur join the show to celebrate their new album.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak reveals to Sundarlal that Jethalal fantasises about getting married again. Champaklal, upon learning Jethalal's real intentions, becomes angry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal reveals that he sees through everyone's lies about Jethalal. Later, Sundarlal tells Jethalal about Daya returning to Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and the kids see someone on the terrace of Gokuldham Society and get a good fright when they investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhvi orders a soap from Abdul's shop, Abdul arrives at Bhide's house. Abdul finds himself in a fix when he slips and collapses on the floor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul eagerly waits for his birthday wishes, but he feels sad when his friend makes him realise that no one has wished him yet.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul is happy when the ladies and Tapu's group come to his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A malicious influence attempts to control Abdul's mind, wanting to make him doubt his friends' intentions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends enjoy their vacation. They play cricket in the compound but eventually face numerous problems during their game.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and friends inform Bhide about Taarak's magical show. A famous magician, Munnalal, arrives at Gokuldham to astound everyone with his performance.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Munnalal impresses the audience with his talents and involves the residents in his magical acts, enhancing the show's appeal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham residents enjoy participating in and watching the magical performance. Tapu's gang show interest in learning the art of magic from Munnalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends visit Munnalal, who teaches them special tricks. The group showcase their newly acquired magical skills to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and friends accidentally misplace Madhavi's money while performing magic tricks. Bhide creates a scene in the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal accuses Taarak for Tapu and his friends' mistake. Dr Hathi comes back from the Naturo Camp without any noticeable changes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal struggles to be romantic with his wife due to Champaklal's interference. Champaklal keeps telling Jethalal about his health.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu accidentally damages Bhide's balcony during a cricket match. Bhide rushes to scold Tapu, but Jethalal intervenes to defend his son.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide initiates an urgent meeting, persuading members to raise money to buy paint for Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham Society are fascinated by credit cards after seeing Babita use them and attempt to acquire their own cards for shopping.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Mahila Mandal decide to apply for a credit card. They invite a bank employee who completes their forms and charges 500 rupees to process the application without papers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham Society are fascinated by credit cards after seeing Babita use them and attempt to acquire their own cards for shopping.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The bank employees continue to harass the ladies and force them to pay the credit card charges. The ladies discuss the issue with their family members who come up with a plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women ask the police to arrest the bank's staff after they harass them over the credit card payments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya put on old clothes in a romantic spirit, but they feel shy when they're watched by everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Daya spills tea on Jethalal's cheque, he gets irate and scolds her. He realises his mistake and calls home but gets no reply.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Having insulted Daya's family earlier, Jethalal is now petrified of the consequences. He rushes back home to apologise to Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is unable to talk to Daya. Babita tell Bhide how Jethalal is acting weird and throwing stones at everyone.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa rushes to join her neighbours, who are fighting for water supply. Later, irked by Pushpa's behaviour, the officer decides to deprive the locality of water.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Lord Ganesh tells the story of Sanat Kumar's birth as Lord Kartikeya. Later, when Lord Kartikeya arrives at Kailash with Lord Shiva and Mata Parvati, the heavens celebrate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak Mehta introduces the members of Gokuldham society one by one. Later, Jethalal grows sick and tired of being blamed for Tapu's mischief and tries to find a solution for it.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma slaps Gyanprakash for his actions while Haseena decides to investigate the case. Later, the officers disguise themselves after finding a lead on the target.

programme.desc: Karishma slaps Gyanprakash for his actions while Haseena decides to investigate the case. Later, the officers disguise themselves after finding a lead on the target.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Virat successfully persuades Anvita to dine with him at a restaurant. However, upon returning home they encounter an inebriated Suhas, whose disorderly behaviour disrupts the evening.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Host and comedian Kapil Sharma invites celebrity guests from various entertainment industries to discuss their work while entertaining them and the audience with humorous skits and lively banter.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.desc: Some of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcase people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai intervenes when two villagers fight and accuse each other of being a thief. Later, Sai comes up with an amicable solution to resolve their dispute.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni asks Dabholkar to come home in order to impress him with his hospitality. In the meantime, the women of Shirdi find it difficult to become independent.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Upon learning of Dabholkar's plan to return to Mumbai, Sai requests him to listen to the Sundara Kanda and postpone his departure by a day.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai presents himself at three places simultaneously to help the three women. On the other hand, Dabholkar realises that the person appearing in his dreams is none other than Sai.
